headline: Coinbase Global Comes Closer To ‘Everything Exchange’ With Latest Product Launches
summary: Coinbase Global Inc is rolling out an AI-powered investment advisor that provides "personalized guidance" by analyzing a user’s portfolios and account history. Here are some key analyst takeaways: Needham analyst John Todaro maintained a Buy rating and price target of $220. BTIG analyst Andrew Harte reiterated a Buy rating and price target of $280. Needham: Coinbase is "pushing more into equities, options, AI and prediction markets," Todaro said in a note. Don’t Miss: A single bad hire can set a
